name: HW3 Applied: Zero-Shot Super Resolution
description: PSNR-based grading for ZSSR: 50 base + 35x2 unseen images
setup_code:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
import numpy as np
import math
import time as _time
import io, base64
from PIL import Image as PILImage
import matplotlib
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from IPython.display import display, HTML
from resize_right import resize as resize_right_resize
from resize_right.interp_methods import cubic as cubic_interp
from skimage import data as _skdata

# Core utils (inline copy for grading)
def psnr(img1, img2):
    if isinstance(img1, torch.Tensor): img1 = img1.detach().cpu().float().numpy()
    if isinstance(img2, torch.Tensor): img2 = img2.detach().cpu().float().numpy()
    img1 = np.clip(img1.astype(np.float64), 0, 1)
    img2 = np.clip(img2.astype(np.float64), 0, 1)
    mse = np.mean((img1 - img2) ** 2)
    if mse == 0: return float('inf')
    return 20 * np.log10(1.0 / np.sqrt(mse))

def resize_bicubic(image_tensor, scale_factor=None, size=None):
    ndim = image_tensor.dim()
    if ndim == 2: image_tensor = image_tensor.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)
    elif ndim == 3: image_tensor = image_tensor.unsqueeze(0)
    if scale_factor is not None:
        sf = [1, 1, scale_factor, scale_factor]
        resized = resize_right_resize(image_tensor, scale_factors=sf, interp_method=cubic_interp, antialiasing=(scale_factor < 1))
    elif size is not None:
        if isinstance(size, int): size = (size, size)
        out_shape = [image_tensor.shape[0], image_tensor.shape[1], size[0], size[1]]
        resized = resize_right_resize(image_tensor, out_shape=out_shape, interp_method=cubic_interp, antialiasing=True)
    else: raise ValueError('Must provide scale_factor or size')
    if ndim == 2: return resized.squeeze(0).squeeze(0)
    elif ndim == 3: return resized.squeeze(0)
    return resized

def _to_display(img):
    if isinstance(img, torch.Tensor): img = img.detach().cpu().float().numpy()
    img = np.clip(img, 0, 1)
    if img.ndim == 3 and img.shape[0] in (1, 3): img = np.transpose(img, (1, 2, 0))
    return img

def _make_comparison(hr, bic, sr, psnr_bic, psnr_sr, title):
    """Create side-by-side comparison figure for graded notebook."""
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 5))
    axes[0].imshow(_to_display(hr)); axes[0].set_title('Ground Truth'); axes[0].axis('off')
    axes[1].imshow(_to_display(bic)); axes[1].set_title(f'Bicubic ({psnr_bic:.2f} dB)'); axes[1].axis('off')
    axes[2].imshow(_to_display(sr)); axes[2].set_title(f'ZSSR ({psnr_sr:.2f} dB)'); axes[2].axis('off')
    fig.suptitle(f'{title} — Improvement: {psnr_sr - psnr_bic:+.2f} dB', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

def _run_sr_test(hr, sf, label):
    """Run train_and_evaluate on an HR image, return (psnr_improvement, sr_tensor) or raise."""
    lr = resize_bicubic(hr, scale_factor=1.0/sf)
    print(f'{label}: HR={hr.shape}, LR={lr.shape}')
    t0 = _time.time()
    sr = train_and_evaluate(lr, scale_factor=sf, device="cpu")
    dt = _time.time() - t0
    assert sr is not None, 'train_and_evaluate returned None'
    if isinstance(sr, np.ndarray): sr = torch.from_numpy(sr).float()
    if sr.dim() == 4: sr = sr.squeeze(0)
    assert sr.dim() == 3 and sr.shape[0] == 3, f'Expected (3,H,W), got {sr.shape}'
    th, tw = hr.shape[-2], hr.shape[-1]
    if sr.shape[-2] != th or sr.shape[-1] != tw:
        sr = resize_bicubic(sr, size=(th, tw))
    sr = torch.clamp(sr, 0, 1)
    bic = torch.clamp(resize_bicubic(lr, size=(th, tw)), 0, 1)
    p_bic = psnr(bic, hr)
    p_sr = psnr(sr, hr)
    improvement = p_sr - p_bic
    print(f'  Bicubic: {p_bic:.2f} dB | ZSSR: {p_sr:.2f} dB | Improvement: {improvement:+.2f} dB | Time: {dt:.1f}s')
    _make_comparison(hr, bic, sr, p_bic, p_sr, label)
    return improvement

# === Test images ===
# Base test: same images students work with (center crops for speed)
_astro_full = torch.from_numpy(_skdata.astronaut().astype(np.float32) / 255.0).permute(2, 0, 1)
_astro_hr = _astro_full[:, 128:384, 128:384]  # 256x256 center crop

_chelsea_full = torch.from_numpy(_skdata.chelsea().astype(np.float32) / 255.0).permute(2, 0, 1)
_chelsea_hr = _chelsea_full[:, 22:278, 97:353]  # 256x256 center crop

# Unseen test images
_coffee_full = torch.from_numpy(_skdata.coffee().astype(np.float32) / 255.0).permute(2, 0, 1)
_unseen1_hr = _coffee_full[:, :400, :400]  # 400x400, even

_rocket_full = torch.from_numpy(_skdata.rocket().astype(np.float32) / 255.0).permute(2, 0, 1)
_h_r, _w_r = _rocket_full.shape[-2], _rocket_full.shape[-1]
_unseen2_hr = _rocket_full[:, (_h_r-301)//2:(_h_r-301)//2+301, (_w_r-301)//2:(_w_r-301)//2+301]  # 301x301, odd

print(f'Base images: astro={_astro_hr.shape}, chelsea={_chelsea_hr.shape}')
print(f'Unseen images: coffee={_unseen1_hr.shape}, rocket={_unseen2_hr.shape}')

tests.name: base_check
tests.description: Code runs on both provided images and beats bicubic baseline on both
tests.code:
_sf = 4
print('=== Base check: provided images ===')
_p_astro = _run_sr_test(_astro_hr, _sf, 'Astronaut (provided)')
assert _p_astro > 0, f'ZSSR must beat bicubic on Astronaut (got {_p_astro:+.2f} dB)'

_p_chelsea = _run_sr_test(_chelsea_hr, _sf, 'Chelsea (provided)')
assert _p_chelsea > 0, f'ZSSR must beat bicubic on Chelsea (got {_p_chelsea:+.2f} dB)'

print(f'\nBase check PASSED: Astronaut +{_p_astro:.2f} dB, Chelsea +{_p_chelsea:.2f} dB')

tests.name: unseen_image_1
tests.description: PSNR improvement on unseen test image 1 (even dimensions)
tests.code:
_sf = 4
print('=== Unseen image 1 ===')
try:
    _p_unseen1 = _run_sr_test(_unseen1_hr, _sf, 'Unseen image 1')
    _p1 = max(0, _p_unseen1)
    _score_u1 = min(35, int(_p1 ** 2 / 2))
    print(f'Formula: floor({_p1:.2f}^2 / 2) = {_score_u1}')
    if _score_u1 > 0:
        _results['tests']['unseen_image_1'] = f'BONUS: {_score_u1}'
        print(f'Score: {_score_u1}/35')
    else:
        _results['tests']['unseen_image_1'] = f'BONUS: 0'
        print('Score: 0/35 (no improvement over bicubic)')
except Exception as _e1:
    print(f'Failed: {_e1}')
    _results['tests']['unseen_image_1'] = f'FAIL: {_e1}'

tests.name: unseen_image_2
tests.description: PSNR improvement on unseen test image 2 (odd dimensions)
tests.code:
_sf = 4
print('=== Unseen image 2 ===')
try:
    _p_unseen2 = _run_sr_test(_unseen2_hr, _sf, 'Unseen image 2')
    _p2 = max(0, _p_unseen2)
    _score_u2 = min(35, int(_p2 ** 2 / 2))
    print(f'Formula: floor({_p2:.2f}^2 / 2) = {_score_u2}')
    if _score_u2 > 0:
        _results['tests']['unseen_image_2'] = f'BONUS: {_score_u2}'
        print(f'Score: {_score_u2}/35')
    else:
        _results['tests']['unseen_image_2'] = f'BONUS: 0'
        print('Score: 0/35 (no improvement over bicubic)')
except Exception as _e2:
    print(f'Failed: {_e2}')
    _results['tests']['unseen_image_2'] = f'FAIL: {_e2}'
